title: vincetoxicum luteum
intro: Vincetoxicum luteum, also known as Yellow Swallowwort, is a species of flowering plant in the milkweed family (Apocynaceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Vincetoxicum luteum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine.
